description: A customer reports they can make calls but have no mobile data connection.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and check if their plan includes data.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the customer has an active data plan.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the customer to check if mobile data is enabled on their device and to restart their phone.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides clear, basic troubleshooting steps.

nodes.task_description: If the issue persists, trigger a network refresh for the customer's SIM card from the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully uses the 'refresh SIM profile' tool.
